resources.string: 1. Tap Enable Mobile Protection to activate background protection. 2. Motion while locked triggers a 10-second unlock grace period. 3. If still locked, the phone vibrates for 10 seconds. 4. The alarm then keeps ringing until the phone is unlocked.
Sensor-based motion detection watches the phone while locked. If movement is detected, JourneyGuard waits 10 seconds, vibrates for 10 seconds, then starts the alarm until you unlock the device.
Device identification for recovery and ownership support
Account Details ------------------------------ Name: %1$s Phone: %2$s IMEI: %3$s Joined: %4$s

How to get IMEI:
1. Open Phone Dialer
2. Dial: *#06#
3. Your 15-digit IMEI will appear

Why we need it: If you lose your phone, we can help confirm device ownership.
Protection is started and monitoring this phone
Allow notifications so JourneyGuard can warn you about suspicious activity
Protection is started and watching this phone while it is locked.
Unlock within 10 seconds to stop the warning sequence.
The phone stayed locked. JourneyGuard is vibrating for 10 seconds.
The alarm is getting louder and will continue until you unlock the phone.
Critical JourneyGuard alerts for suspicious movement and alarm escalation.
Fill all fields including Phone and IMEI
Could not sync with protection server
